rationale: Plan v6 is implementation-ready and may execute AS-IS. It is fully consistent with the stated trust model (spine read-only; clotho/ may import merkle-dag primitives but never the reverse; zero runtime/dev deps; closed NODE/EDGE/ASSERTION registries with fail-closed validation; advisory-only boundary enforced by repository-wide lexical scanner and no external import/require of clotho; write boundary limited to ignored .telos/clotho/ plus one explicit committed snapshot). Decisions D1–D19 are mechanically discharged by task ordering, interfaces, inventories, and exit criteria: D12/Task 0 isolates the workflow matrix after scaffold existence; D16/D18 derive and prove repository_ref against real git (shallow reject + full-clone root) plus fetch-depth:0; D17/D19 split inventory commitment and ledger structural validation from driver-level closure equality so no inventory names a non-existent file; D14/D15 bind coverage provenance to transitive static closures and abort-on-failure (no partial published artifacts; only executed|skipped in published manifests); D10/D11 quarantine proposals and classify absence via signed trailer. Normative data model, endpoint matrix (including exact v2.3 discharges walk), content-bound locators, status coupling, and query semantics (manifest-aware coverage-unknown vs missing-edge, inverse-depends-on blastRadius, human-only adjudication) are specified to the byte and fixture level. Flagship acceptance (eight hand-audited groups, 1:1 matching, mandatory review-set, skipped-weaver coverage failure) plus reproduction evidence close the loop. No spine mutation, no open sets, no silent inference, and every exit criterion is green-path + fail-closed. I stake the seat signature on unconditional execution of this plan.
